## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Manual UI check when applicable

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, local databases, or generated build output are included
- [ ] User-facing UI copy uses `lib/i18n.ts` when applicable
- [ ] Guides were updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Public-service risks were considered for data exposure or mutations
